args.query:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%maginnis%'
  AND lower(title) LIKE '%street%hype%';

exec_args.sql:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%maginnis%'
  AND lower(title) LIKE '%street%hype%';

args.query:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street%hype%'
  AND (lower(artist) LIKE '%maginnis%' OR lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%');

exec_args.sql:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street%hype%'
  AND (lower(artist) LIKE '%maginnis%' OR lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%');

args.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as n_tracks FROM tracks;

exec_args.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as n_tracks FROM tracks;

args.query:
SELECT s.store, SUM(s.revenue_usd) AS revenue_usd
FROM sales s
WHERE s.track_id IN (4122, 4628, 14080)
GROUP BY s.store
ORDER BY revenue_usd DESC;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT s.store, SUM(s.revenue_usd) AS revenue_usd
FROM sales s
WHERE s.track_id IN (4122, 4628, 14080)
GROUP BY s.store
ORDER BY revenue_usd DESC;
